jd_text: Company Description Gründe für Accor zu arbeiten? Wir sind weit mehr als ein weltweit führendes Unternehmen. Wir empfangen Dich so, wie Du bist und bei uns findest Du einen Beruf und eine Marke, die zu Deiner Persönlichkeit passen. Wir unterstützen Dich dabei, jeden Tag zu wachsen und zu lernen. Wir sorgen dafür, dass Deine Arbeit einen Sinn in Deinem Leben hat und dass Du auf Deiner Reise mit uns die grenzenlosen Möglichkeiten von Accor erkunden kannst. Bei Accor kannst Du jedes Kapitel Deiner Geschichte selber schreiben, und gemeinsam können wir die Gastronomie und Hotellerie von morgen verändern. Entdecke das Leben, das Dich bei Accor erwartet, besuche https://careers.accor.com/. Tu das, was Du liebst, trage etwas für die Gemeinschaft in der Welt bei, und wage es den Status quo in Frage zu stellen! #BELIMITLESS Job Description We're looking for an experienced and visionary AV Manager to join our dynamic team in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. In this pivotal role, you will oversee all audio-visual operations, lead a talented team of AV professionals, and ensure the seamless execution of cutting-edge AV solutions across our organization. You'll be instrumental in driving innovation, maintaining our state-of-the-art facilities, and delivering exceptional technical support that exceeds client expectations. This is an exciting opportunity to make a meaningful impact in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where your expertise and leadership will be highly valued. Lead, mentor, and supervise the audio-visual department, fostering a culture of continuous learning, professional development, and team excellence Plan, coordinate, and execute comprehensive AV setups for corporate events, conferences, presentations, and specialized productions Develop and maintain detailed AV equipment inventory systems, ensuring optimal maintenance schedules, timely upgrades, and compliance with industry standards Create, manage, and optimize budgets for AV operations, equipment purchases, and departmental initiatives while maintaining fiscal responsibility Collaborate effectively with clients, event planners, internal stakeholders, and cross-functional departments to understand requirements and deliver tailored AV solutions Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues promptly and efficiently, minimizing operational disruptions and ensuring business continuity Stay current with emerging AV technologies, industry trends, and best practices, implementing innovative solutions that enhance organizational capabilities Ensure strict compliance with safety regulations, industry standards, and local requirements specific to the Riyadh market Provide expert technical guidance and support for complex, high-stakes AV projects and initiatives Develop, document, and implement standardized operating procedures for all AV operations, promoting consistency and operational excellence Conduct regular performance reviews and provide constructive feedback to team members, supporting their career growth and professional advancement Qualifications Bachelor's degree in Audio-Visual Technology, Electronics, Engineering, or a closely related field Minimum 5 years of professional experience in AV management, audio-visual operations, or a related supervisory role Comprehensive knowledge of audio-visual systems, equipment, and current industry technologies Proven expertise in project management and event production coordination Demonstrated excellence in leadership, team management, and staff development Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with exceptional troubleshooting skills Proficiency in budgeting, financial planning, and vendor management Experience in the hospitality, entertainment, corporate events, or similar industry (preferred) Industry-recognized certifications such as CTS (Certified Technology Specialist), CTS-I, or CTS-D (highly desirable) Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong interpersonal abilities Proven ability to work flexible hours, including evenings and weekends, as operational needs require Strong organizational skills with meticulous attention to detail and accuracy Ability to adapt to regional requirements and work effectively in a multicultural environment Willingness to relocate to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia Additional Information AV Manager – Your Team And Working Environment Join our Audio-Visual team in a hands-on leadership role focused on overseeing daily AV operations and ensuring the proper setup, maintenance, and functionality of all audio-visual systems. As an AV Manager, you will lead the team in managing AV equipment, coordinating event productions, troubleshooting technical issues, and supporting seamless operation of all AV services across the facility. You will work closely with other AV team members and departments to ensure service efficiency, safety, and consistency. We foster a collaborative and supportive work environment built on teamwork, respect, and continuous improvement. Your technical expertise, leadership, and commitment to quality standards will help create an environment where AV operations run smoothly and team members feel empowered and well supported. Our Commitment To Diversity & Inclusion We are committed to building an inclusive workplace that values diversity and empowers individuals from all backgrounds to grow, contribute, and perform their roles with integrity, professionalism, and purpose.
